mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gen_file_embed ( embed_mission_id, file_id, file_node_id, status_type, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time ) VALUES ( #{embeddingMission.embeddingMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{embeddingMission.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{embeddingMission.FileNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{embeddingMission.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, #{embeddingMission.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{embeddingMission.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{embeddingMission.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{embeddingMission.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE file_id = #{embeddingMission.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_node_id = #{embeddingMission.FileNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_type = #{embeddingMission.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, error_message = #{embeddingMission.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{embeddingMission.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{embeddingMission.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

INSERT INTO gen_file_embed ( embed_mission_id, file_id, file_node_id, status_type, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time ) VALUES
( #{item.embeddingMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.FileNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, #{item.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE file_id = VALUES(file_id), file_node_id = VALUES(file_node_id), status_type = VALUES(status_type), error_message = VALUES(error_message), start_time = VALUES(start_time), end_time = VALUES(end_time)
mapper.select: SELECT embed_mission_id, file_id, file_node_id, status_type, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time FROM gen_file_embed WHERE file_id = #{sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT embed_mission_id, file_id, file_node_id, status_type, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time FROM gen_file_embed WHERE embed_mission_id = #{embeddingMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
